since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.69% · BTC +0.63% · Gold +1.69% · Nasdaq100 +1.46%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.05%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.05%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.96%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.96%, SYNA +8.14%, LRCX +7.01%, MU +6.91%, LSCC +6.80%. Laggards: AVAV -5.07%, PLTR -4.12%, SOUN -3.46%, IBM -2.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.12% at $149.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
